case_title: WALTER ADAMS GALLERIES INC. VS. HEIDIE GERBER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALTER ADAMS GALLERIES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GERBER, HEIDIE
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WALTER ADAMS GALLERIES INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $246.52 FILED BY WALTER ADAMS GALLERIES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GERBER, HEIDIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: RICHARD GROTCH. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
